context:
{{({ input }) => ({
        wounds: wounds(0),
        distractedTimer: conditionTimer(-1),
        vulnerableTimer: conditionTimer(-1),
        isWildCard: input.isWildCard ?? true,
        maxWounds: maxWounds((input.isWildCard ?? true) ? 3 : 1),
        ownTurn: false,
        onHold: false,
        holdUsed: false,
        interruptedSuccessfully: false,
        injuries: [],
        grappledBy: "",
        afflictionTimer: -1,
        activeEffects: []
    })}}
